title: Project Coordinator
description:
Under Armour is a global athletic apparel company creating performance equipment for athletes across 190+ countries.

We're seeking a Project Coordinator to join our Apparel team in Madison. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Support project managers in planning, executing, and closing projects
Maintain project schedules, budgets, and status documentation
Coordinate communication between project team and stakeholders
Track project deliverables and ensure timely completion
Prepare status reports and project documentation
Support process improvement initiatives and best practices

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Project Management, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years in project coordination, operations, or business administration
certifications: CAPM or equivalent project management certification preferred
